regions: Growth Markets (Asia Pacific and Latin America)

supply_chain.dependencies: Large portions of delivery capability based in India and Philippines where majority of workforce is located
risks: Concentrating delivery capability in India and Philippines presents operational risks
Disruptions from health emergencies, terrorist violence, political unrest, natural disasters, climate change impacts
Extended disruptions of electricity, utilities, network or cloud services
Physical infrastructure damage, system failures, cyberattacks at facilities
Geopolitical tensions may exacerbate operational risks

regulatory_risks: Data privacy and cybersecurity laws (GDPR, UK GDPR, US state privacy legislation)
AI regulations (EU AI Act, US Executive Order on AI)
Cross-border data transfer restrictions and data localization requirements
ESG disclosure and reporting requirements (SEC, European regulators)
Climate and human rights related disclosure requirements
Anticorruption laws (US Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, UK Bribery Act 2010)
Government contracting regulations and compliance requirements
Tax law changes and transfer pricing regulations
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax
Employment and labor regulations including works councils requirements
Content requirements and platform trust and safety regulations
Environmental regulations to mitigate climate change effects

sanction_risks: Sanctions imposed in response to Russia's invasion of Ukraine restricting certain services
International conflicts and sanctions impacting ability to deliver services
Trade restrictions and tariffs affecting operations
